query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `page_views` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `pageType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `hostListingId` int,
  `viewDate` date NOT NULL,
  `viewCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_page_view` (`pageType`, `hostListingId`, `viewDate`),
  INDEX `idx_pageType` (`pageType`),
  INDEX `idx_viewDate` (`viewDate`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `page_views` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `pageType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `hostListingId` int,
  `viewDate` date NOT NULL,
  `viewCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_page_view` (`pageType`, `hostListingId`, `viewDate`),
  INDEX `idx_pageType` (`pageType`),
  INDEX `idx_viewDate` (`viewDate`)
);
